message:
test(robot,tui): comprehensive attention system test coverage

Add extensive tests for the attention feed system across the robot,
dashboard, and panel layers:

Robot capabilities (capabilities_test.go):
- TestDefaultAttentionCapabilities_UnsupportedConditionsIncluded:
  verifies bead_orphaned has status, reason, observables, and
  WhatWouldChange fields populated
- TestUnsupportedConditions_ConsistentWithSignalAvailability: ensures
  UnsupportedConditions and SignalAvailability agree on status
- TestUnsupportedConditions_NotInAllWaitConditions: guards that
  unsupported conditions never appear in the valid wait conditions list
- TestIsUnsupportedWaitCondition: table-driven tests for the condition
  detection helper including composed conditions

Robot help text (robot.go):
- Add condition list and bead_orphaned unsupported note to --robot-wait
  help section

Dashboard layout (dashboard_layout_test.go):
- TestVisiblePanelsIncludeAttentionAtSplitAndHideAtNarrow: verifies
  attention panel visibility follows tier thresholds
- TestSortAttentionItemsOrdersByActionabilityThenRecency: verifies
  action_required items sort before interesting, then by timestamp
- TestSplitViewRendersAttentionPanelWhenFocused: end-to-end render test
  with real attention data
- TestMegaLayoutRendersAttentionPanelWhenFocused: same for mega layout

Dashboard popup (dashboard_popup_test.go):
- TestHandleAttentionZoomUsesPaneIndexLookup: verifies zoom navigates
  to the correct pane using injected zoom function
- TestHandleAttentionZoomMissingPaneShowsHealthMessage: verifies
  graceful degradation with health message and warning toast when the
  source pane no longer exists

Attention panel (panels/attention_test.go — new file):
- Comprehensive panel unit tests covering config, focus/blur, data
  setting, cursor clamping, counts, rendering states, relative time
  formatting, and actionability display

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1806,6 +1806,8 @@ Session Operations:
 --robot-interrupt=SESSION  Ctrl+C to agents (--interrupt-msg="new task")
 --robot-is-working=SESSION Check if agents are busy
 --robot-wait=SESSION    Wait for idle state (--timeout=5m, --condition=idle)
+                        Conditions: idle, complete, generating, healthy
+                        Note: bead_orphaned is deliberately unsupported — see --robot-capabilities
 
 Note: Pane-targeting commands exclude the user pane by default.
 Use --all to include the user pane (index depends on tmux pane-base-index).
